name: uob-eis-mvp
description: Executive Information System for University of Baltimore

scripts.deploy:dev: aws cloudformation deploy --template-file infrastructure/main.yaml --stack-name eis-dev --parameter-overrides Environment=dev UniversityName=UniversityOfBaltimore DeploymentsBucketSuffix=universityofbaltimore --capabilities CAPABILITY_NAMED_IAM
scripts.deploy:staging: aws cloudformation deploy --template-file infrastructure/main.yaml --stack-name eis-staging --parameter-overrides Environment=staging UniversityName=UniversityOfBaltimore DeploymentsBucketSuffix=universityofbaltimore --capabilities CAPABILITY_NAMED_IAM
scripts.deploy:prod: aws cloudformation deploy --template-file infrastructure/main.yaml --stack-name eis-prod --parameter-overrides Environment=prod UniversityName=UniversityOfBaltimore DeploymentsBucketSuffix=universityofbaltimore --capabilities CAPABILITY_NAMED_IAM
